name: Bohai Automotive Systems CO., LTD.
summary: Bohai Automotive Systems Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells pistons in China and internationally. Its pistons are used in passenger and commercial, engineering, marine, agriculture, general motor, and other vehicles. The company was formerly known as Shandong Binzhou Bohai Piston Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Bohai Automotive Systems Co., Ltd. in October 2017. Bohai Automotive Systems Co., Ltd. is based in Binzhou, China.
